_note: In-cluster access + Route are testable on CRC. The pre-provisioned NetworkPolicy normally comes from spec.session.objects (the deploy script builds its own Workshop CR without it), so a run-step creates it here to exercise the observe step. verify-egress-blocked is EXPECTED TO FAIL on CRC (it has internet egress; the real DCS platform is air-gapped).

steps.run: envsubst < hello-dcs.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=150s

oc apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-hello-dcs-ingress
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: hello-dcs
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  ingress:
  - ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080
EOF
